title: activate_subscription_atomic: subscription+invoice deletion in single transaction prevents double-activation
description: store.rs activate_subscription_atomic() writes subscription and deletes invoice in a single SQLite transaction. This is correct and non-obvious: if the relay crashes between these two writes, a duplicate payment_watcher scan would find the invoice and activate again. The atomic transaction eliminates that class of double-activation. Do not split into two separate calls; the current design is correct and should be defended against 'simplification'.
